hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 104 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 19 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】真主党无人机如何改变以色列在黎巴嫩的战略；【CRYPTO】渣打银行的肯德里克表示，Strategy 的比特币销售可能标志着以太币表现优异的开始；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：以色列从对贝鲁特的威胁撤军后袭击黎巴嫩南部。

items.title: How Hezbollah Drones Changed Israel’s Strategy in Lebanon
items.summary: An Israeli campaign that started with high hopes has devolved into a kind of impasse, with Hezbollah looking more capable than it did when the war began.
items.title_zh: 真主党无人机如何改变以色列在黎巴嫩的战略
items.summary_zh: 以色列的一场原本满怀希望的战役已经陷入僵局，真主党看起来比战争开始时更有能力。

items.title: Strategy's bitcoin sale may mark start of ether outperformance, StanChart's Kendrick says
items.summary: ETH could outperform BTC by 40% from current levels as bitcoin treasuries may sell assets to cover obligations, the bank's digital asset research head said.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行的肯德里克表示，Strategy 的比特币销售可能标志着以太币表现优异的开始
items.summary_zh: 该银行数字资产研究主管表示，由于比特币国债可能会出售资产来偿还债务，ETH 的表现可能比 BTC 的水平高出 40%。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Strikes Southern Lebanon After Pulling Back From Threat to Beirut
items.summary: Under pressure from President Trump, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel held off from attacking Beirut. But he vowed to continue Israel’s campaign against Hezbollah, which could threaten peace talks with Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：以色列从对贝鲁特的威胁撤军后袭击黎巴嫩南部
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普总统的压力下，以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡推迟了对贝鲁特的袭击。但他发誓要继续以色列针对真主党的行动，这可能会威胁到与伊朗的和平谈判。

items.title: Bitcoin derivatives markets flashing warning signs as price plunges below $70,000
items.summary: Open interest has risen to 773,000 BTC, one of the highest readings on record, while funding rates remain elevated despite weak spot demand and growing market fear.
items.title_zh: 比特币衍生品市场闪现警告信号，价格跌破 70,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 未平仓合约已升至 773,000 BTC，这是有记录以来的最高读数之一，尽管现货需求疲软和市场担忧加剧，但融资利率仍然很高。

items.title: Greg Abel just made his first big deal as Berkshire CEO. Why Warren Buffett is happy
items.summary: Berkshire's purchase of homebuilder Taylor Morrison gives the conglomerate a larger foothold in housing and appears to have been struck at a bargain valuation.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔刚刚完成了他作为伯克希尔首席执行官的第一笔大交易。为什么沃伦·巴菲特很高兴
items.summary_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司收购房屋建筑商泰勒·莫里森(Taylor Morrison)，使该集团在房地产领域获得了更大的立足点，而且估值似乎很便宜。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway buys Taylor Morrison for $6.8 billion. Buffett touts Abel’s deal-making
items.summary: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司以 68 亿美元收购泰勒·莫里森。巴菲特吹捧阿贝尔的交易
items.summary_zh: 此次收购是沃伦·巴菲特的继任者格雷格·阿贝尔 (Greg Abel) 领导下的首批重大战略交易之一，格雷格·阿贝尔于 2026 年初接任首席执行官。

items.title: Clashes continue in Lebanon despite Israel and Hezbollah accepting US partial ceasefire plan
items.summary: A cessation of hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah is seen as crucial to the peace process with Iran.
items.title_zh: 尽管以色列和真主党接受美国部分停火计划，黎巴嫩冲突仍在继续
items.summary_zh: 以色列和真主党之间停止敌对行动被视为对伊朗和平进程至关重要。

items.title: How Lebanon’s Best Chance to Disarm Hezbollah Failed
items.summary: Lebanon’s government has long wanted the powerful militia to give up its weapons. Before the Iran war began, there were signs of progress toward that goal.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩解除真主党武装的最佳机会为何失败
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩政府长期以来一直希望强大的民兵放弃武器。在伊朗战争开始之前，就有迹象表明这一目标已取得进展。

items.title: Standard Chartered says Strategy’s bitcoin sale may mark start of ETH outperformance
items.summary: Standard Chartered said Ethereum DATs have an advantage over bitcoin DATs because ETH's staking yield means they do not need to sell ETH.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行表示，Strategy 的比特币销售可能标志着 ETH 表现优异的开始
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行表示，以太坊 DAT 比比特币 DAT 有优势，因为 ETH 的质押收益率意味着他们不需要出售 ETH。

items.title: Russia Launches Deadly Strikes on Kyiv After Threatening Ukraine for a Week
items.summary: Moscow’s repeated warnings of a major strike, combined with the delay before it happened, seemed intended to inflict a psychological toll on the Ukrainian capital.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在威胁乌克兰一周后对基辅发动致命袭击
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科一再发出重大罢工的警告，再加上罢工发生前的拖延，似乎是为了给乌克兰首都造成心理打击。

items.title: Strive added 2,500 bitcoin last week to reach 19,000 BTC as Strategy sold
items.summary: Benchmark's Mark Palmer also initiated coverage of the stock with a Buy rating and $32 price target as ASST shares fell about 4% pre-market.
items.title_zh: 随着Strategy的出售，Strive上周增加了2,500个比特币，达到19,000个比特币
items.summary_zh: Benchmark 的 Mark Palmer 也开始对该股给予买入评级和 32 美元的目标价，因为 ASST 股价在盘前下跌了约 4%。

items.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows are noise as Wall Street doubles down on crypto, says analyst
items.summary: Recent Bitcoin ETF outflows look dramatic in headlines, but Bloomberg Intelligence's Eric Balchunas says the broader adoption story remains intact.
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，随着华尔街加倍押注加密货币，比特币 ETF 资金外流是噪音
items.summary_zh: 最近的比特币 ETF 资金流出在头条新闻中看起来很引人注目，但彭博资讯的埃里克·巴尔丘纳斯 (Eric Balchunas) 表示，更广泛的采用情况仍然完好无损。

items.title: Tom Lee calls Strategy's bitcoin sale classic 'bottom behavior'
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies chairman said minor sales from key holders and institutional outflows are typical market bottom behaviors rather than structural threats.
items.title_zh: 汤姆·李称Strategy的比特币销售是典型的“底层行为”
items.summary_zh: Bitmine Immersion Technologies董事长表示，关键持有人的小幅抛售和机构资金流出是典型的市场底部行为，而不是结构性威胁。

items.title: ‘Materially softer demand’: Bitcoin hits two-month low below $69,000 amid institutional outflow streak, fading onchain interest
items.summary: Bitcoin fell below $69,000 to a two-month low as ETF outflows hit $3.45 billion over 11 days, along with $742 million in liquidations.
items.title_zh: “需求大幅疲软”：由于机构资金连续流出，链上兴趣减弱，比特币触及两个月低点，低于 69,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 由于 ETF 资金流出在 11 天内达到 34.5 亿美元，以及 7.42 亿美元的清算，比特币跌破 69,000 美元，创两个月低点。

items.title: Franklin Templeton brings BENJI tokenized fund to MoonPay
items.summary: The partnership will serve as "the foundation for a broader strategic relationship between Franklin Templeton and MoonPay."
items.title_zh: 富兰克林邓普顿将 BENJI 代币化基金引入 MoonPay
items.summary_zh: 此次合作将成为“富兰克林邓普顿和 MoonPay 之间更广泛的战略关系的基础”。

items.title: Ghana's anti-LGBTQ+ bill to be scrutinised before approval, president says
items.summary: Passed by MPs, the bill proposes prison sentences for people identifying as part of the LGBTQ+ community.
items.title_zh: 加纳总统表示，反 LGBTQ+ 法案将在批准前接受审查
items.summary_zh: 该法案经国会议员通过，提议对 LGBTQ+ 群体的人判处监禁。

items.title: Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts
items.summary: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.
items.title_zh: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗以访问他人帐户
items.summary_zh: 一些报道将这一事件与最近高调的 Instagram 帐户被劫持的案件联系起来。

items.title: Russia Is Showing Signs of Weakness in Ukraine. So It Hits Harder.
items.summary: The war has not been going the Kremlin’s way recently, with battleground losses and mounting casualties. With renewed strikes, Moscow hopes to gain a better position for negotiations.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在乌克兰问题上显示出软弱迹象。所以打击更大。
items.summary_zh: 最近，战争并没有朝着克里姆林宫的方向发展，战场上的损失和伤亡人数不断增加。通过新一轮的罢工，莫斯科希望在谈判中获得更好的地位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #20.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 32 位。

items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 114。

items.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
items.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何利用 Codex 建立代理组织
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 Codex 构建代理组织、加速软件交付并将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nvidia, Meta and SLB rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
items.summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明，Nvidia、Meta 和 SLB 在采用人工智能方面名列前茅
items.summary_zh: 人工智能驱动企业研究所发布了一项新研究，详细分析了标准普尔 500 强公司与同行相比采用人工智能的程度。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) falls 8.4%, leading index lower
items.summary: Aave (AAVE), down 3.9% from Monday, was also an underperformer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Stellar (XLM) 下跌 8.4%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: Aave (AAVE) 较周一下跌 3.9%，表现也不佳。

items.title: Live markets: bitcoin's plunge continues, putting February $60,000 low back in play
items.summary: Google overnight set an $80 billion capital raise, including $10 billion from Berkshire Hathaway, reflecting the continuing flood of money headed into AI (and not crypto).
items.title_zh: 实时市场：比特币继续暴跌，使 2 月 60,000 美元的低点重新发挥作用
items.summary_zh: 谷歌隔夜筹集了 800 亿美元的资金，其中包括来自伯克希尔哈撒韦公司的 100 亿美元，反映出资金持续涌入人工智能（而非加密货币）。

items.title: Galaxy Digital opens OTC prediction market trading for institutions, kicks off with $10 million Kalshi trade
items.summary: Galaxy Digital launches institutional OTC prediction markets trading, executing a $10M Clarity Act trade with Arca on Kalshi at launch.
items.title_zh: Galaxy Digital为机构开放OTC预测市场交易，以1000万美元的Kalshi交易拉开序幕
items.summary_zh: Galaxy Digital 推出机构场外预测市场交易，并在推出时与 Arca 在 Kalshi 上执行了 1000 万美元的 Clarity Act 交易。

items.title: HIVE reports 158% jump in annual revenue to $298 million as bitcoin holdings fall to 150 BTC
items.summary: The company reduced its bitcoin holdings from 481 BTC to 150 BTC during the last quarter, while its bitcoin mining revenue fell 23.9%.
items.title_zh: HIVE 报告称，随着比特币持有量降至 150 BTC，年收入增长 158% 至 2.98 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 上季度，该公司将其比特币持有量从 481 BTC 减少至 150 BTC，而其比特币挖矿收入下降了 23.9%。

items.title: Backpack launches securities platform blending traditional and tokenized stock trading
items.summary: Backpack Securities combines a U.S.-regulated brokerage for traditional equities ownership with a tokenization platform.
items.title_zh: Backpack推出融合传统和代币化股票交易的证券平台
items.summary_zh: Backpack Securities 将受美国监管的传统股权经纪公司与代币化平台相结合。

items.title: Hamilton Lane’s tokenized HLSCOPE fund launches on Tron, marking first Securitize asset on the network
items.summary: Hamilton Lane’s tokenized Senior Credit Opportunities Fund will be the first Securitize-issued asset to launch on TRON.
items.title_zh: Hamilton Lane 的代币化 HLSCOPE 基金在 Tron 上推出，标志着网络上的第一个证券化资产
items.summary_zh: Hamilton Lane 的代币化高级信贷机会基金将成为波场上推出的第一个证券化发行的资产。

items.title: Following token-dumping scandal, Movement seeks new life as a Layer 1
items.summary: Move Industries has partnered with several firms, including Circle, as it relaunches Movement as a Layer 1 and refocuses on emerging markets.
items.title_zh: 继代币倾销丑闻之后，Movement 寻求作为 Layer 1 的新生命
items.summary_zh: Move Industries 已与包括 Circle 在内的多家公司合作，将 Movement 作为 Layer 1 重新推出，并重新专注于新兴市场。

items.title: MoneyGram debuts MGUSD stablecoin on Stellar for its global payments network
items.summary: MoneyGram launched MGUSD, a USD stablecoin on Stellar backed by Bridge and Fireblocks, targeting 60M+ customers for cross-border payments.
items.title_zh: MoneyGram 在 Stellar 上为其全球支付网络推出 MGUSD 稳定币
items.summary_zh: MoneyGram 在 Stellar 上推出了 MGUSD，这是一种由 Bridge 和 Fireblocks 支持的美元稳定币，目标是超过 6000 万客户进行跨境支付。

items.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
items.title_zh: Codex 正在成为每个人的生产力工具
items.summary_zh: 知识工作的下一个时代报告探讨了 Codex 如何通过人工智能驱动的研究、数据分析、工作流程自动化和内容创建来改变生产力。

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 前沿模型和 Codex 现已在 AWS 上提供
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 前沿模型和 Codex 现已在 AWS 上普遍提供，为企业提供了一条通过他们已使用的 AWS 环境、控制和采购工作流程使用 OpenAI 进行构建的新途径。客户可以开始使用 AWS 上的 OpenAI 并更快地完成评估

items.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
items.summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
items.title_zh: 通过 Rosalind Biodefense 增强社会复原力
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind Biodefense，为经过审查的开发人员和美国政府合作伙伴扩大对 GPT-Rosalind 的可信访问，通过前沿 AI 推进生物防御、公共卫生和大流行病防范。

items.title: A shared playbook for trustworthy third party evaluations
items.summary: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.
items.title_zh: 值得信赖的第三方评估的共享手册
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 分享了第三方人工智能评估指南，涵盖如何评估前沿系统的模型能力、保障措施和有效性。

items.title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
items.title_zh: Mellum2 简介：JetBrains 的 12B 专家混合模型

items.title: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
items.title_zh: 欢迎 NVIDIA Cosmos 3：首个用于物理 AI 推理和行动的开放式全模型

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
items.summary: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场推动华尔街采用，Polymarket 完成首笔大宗交易
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台越来越多地将机构交易者而非个人交易者视为下一个增长场所。

items.title: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
items.summary: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.
items.title_zh: 个体交易员推动了卡尔希的上涨。现在，它正走向华尔街
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的一系列举措中，美国预测市场平台正在努力使其事件合约对机构交易更具吸引力。

items.title: Rubio odds for GOP 2028 nominee close to overtaking Vance on Kalshi
items.summary: Vice President Vance has seen his odds slip since the start of the year, as the secretary of State's chances have been buoyed by international conflicts.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥获得共和党 2028 年提名的可能性接近超越万斯
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，副总统万斯的胜算一直在下降，因为国际冲突增加了国务卿的机会。

items.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
items.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.
items.title_zh: “要么颠覆，要么消亡”：人工智能正在摧毁 ChatGPT 之前建立的一代初创公司
items.summary_zh: 人工智能热潮为 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 注入了超过 2500 亿美元，这使得在 2022 年 ChatGPT 到来之前建立的数百家初创公司陷入困境。

items.title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
items.summary: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.
items.title_zh: 中国初创公司考虑首次公开募股，英伟达选择 Unitree 作为人形机器人平台
items.summary_zh: 这家美国芯片制造商的第一个公开的人形机器人系统将使用中国初创公司 Unitree 的人形机器人。

items.title: China’s factory activity beats forecasts in May, private survey shows, despite softer official data
items.summary: China’s manufacturing activity expanded faster than expected in May, according to a private survey released Monday, although growth slowed from April.
items.title_zh: 私人调查显示，尽管官方数据疲软，中国 5 月份工厂活动仍超出预期
items.summary_zh: 周一发布的一项私人调查显示，中国 5 月份制造业活动扩张速度快于预期，但增速较 4 月份有所放缓。

items.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
items.summary: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is scheduled to be interviewed about his relationship to the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in June.
items.title_zh: 巴克莱银行前首席执行官 Jes Staley 同意 7 月 23 日接受监督小组关于杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 的采访
items.summary_zh: 微软联合创始人比尔盖茨计划于六月接受采访，谈论他与性犯罪者杰弗里爱泼斯坦的关系。

items.title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 18 people
items.summary: An eight-year-old boy and a woman killed in a strike on an apartment block are among the dead, officials say.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯空袭造成18人死亡，乌克兰救援人员从废墟中救出遇难者
items.summary_zh: 官员称，一名八岁男孩和一名妇女在公寓楼袭击中丧生。

items.title: Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.summary: The US plan has sparked public anger and led to demonstrations near the site of the proposed treatment facility.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚抗议美国埃博拉检疫中心计划，两人被枪杀
items.summary_zh: 美国的计划引发了公众的愤怒，并导致拟建治疗设施附近发生示威活动。

items.title: China goes after 'ghost kitchens' to rein in cut-throat food delivery apps
items.summary: The thousands of "ghost kitchens" - online shops that don't actually exist - have spooked Chinese consumers.
items.title_zh: 中国打击“幽灵厨房”以遏制残酷的送餐应用
items.summary_zh: 数以千计的“幽灵厨房”——实际上并不存在的网上商店——让中国消费者感到恐慌。

items.title: Sabrina Carpenter gets restraining order against man who showed up at her home
items.summary: The singer reported a series of "deeply alarming" incidents at her house to Los Angeles police.
items.title_zh: 萨布丽娜·卡彭特 (Sabrina Carpenter) 收到针对出现在她家的男子的限制令
items.summary_zh: 这位歌手向洛杉矶警方报告了她家中发生的一系列“令人深感震惊”的事件。

items.title: Maga influencer admits London Tube station assault
items.summary: Melissa Rein Lively accepted a caution, while an assault by beating charge against her was withdrawn.
items.title_zh: Maga 影响者承认伦敦地铁站袭击事件
items.summary_zh: 梅丽莎·雷因·莱弗利接受了警告，而对她的殴打指控也被撤回。

items.title: AI giant Anthropic plans to sell shares in US as valuation nears $1tn
items.summary: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public the chance to buy and sell shares in the firm later this year.
items.title_zh: AI巨头Anthropic计划在美国出售股票，估值接近1万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 克劳德背后的人工智能公司将于今年晚些时候向公众提供买卖该公司股票的机会。

items.title: U.S. Ebola Unit Plans in Kenya, Subject of Protests, Suffers New Setback From Court Ruling
items.summary: The court further delayed the Trump administration’s proposed quarantine unit for Americans exposed to the virus. The plan has sparked angry protests in Kenya.
items.title_zh: 美国在肯尼亚的埃博拉部队计划因抗议而遭受法院裁决的新挫折
items.summary_zh: 法院进一步推迟了特朗普政府提议的针对接触该病毒的美国人的隔离设施。该计划在肯尼亚引发了愤怒的抗议。

items.title: The New Zealand Parakeet Pair That Are Saving Their Species
items.summary: There are about 450 orange-fronted parakeets left in the world. Super breeders Nacho and Trixie are doing their best to bolster the population.
items.title_zh: 新西兰鹦鹉对正在拯救自己的物种
items.summary_zh: 世界上仅存约 450 只橙额鹦鹉。超级饲养员纳乔和特里克西正在尽最大努力增加种群数量。

items.title: U.S. Was Asked to Blacklist Colombian Cartel Gold. It Was Also Buying It.
items.summary: The request for sanctions, from Colombia’s defense minister, shows failures at both ends of the supply chain for illegal gold.
items.title_zh: 美国被要求将哥伦比亚卡特尔黄金列入黑名单。它也在购买它。
items.summary_zh: 哥伦比亚国防部长提出的制裁请求显示了非法黄金供应链两端的失败。

items.title: A Stray Dog Became a Cultural Symbol in Brazil. Now, Mexico Is Claiming It.
items.summary: To Brazilians, the ubiquitous caramel-colored mutts are a national icon. But a Mexican state has adopted them as its own homegrown symbol.
items.title_zh: 流浪狗成为巴西的文化象征。现在，墨西哥声称拥有主权。
items.summary_zh: 对于巴西人来说，无处不在的焦糖色杂种狗是国家的象征。但墨西哥州已将它们作为自己本土的象征。

items.title: An Industrial Gem in Venezuela Now Embodies the Country’s Decay
items.summary: Cumaná was once an economic hub, producing Toyota Land Cruisers and exporting food across South America. Now it’s on the brink of disaster as public services collapse.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉的工业瑰宝现在体现了该国的衰落
items.summary_zh: 库马纳曾经是一个经济中心，生产丰田陆地巡洋舰并向南美洲出口食品。现在，随着公共服务崩溃，它正处于灾难的边缘。

items.title: Franklin Templeton teams up with MoonPay to let big investors swap stablecoins for yields 24/7
items.summary: The Wall Street giant is integrating its tech platform with MoonPay's infrastructure, allowing eligible institutions to seamlessly swap stablecoins for yield-generating tokenized funds without ever leaving the blockchain.
items.title_zh: 富兰克林邓普顿与 MoonPay 合作，让大投资者可以 24/7 将稳定币换成收益
items.summary_zh: 这家华尔街巨头正在将其技术平台与 MoonPay 的基础设施相集成，允许符合条件的机构将稳定币无缝地转换为产生收益的代币化基金，而无需离开区块链。

items.title: Movement pivots to stablecoin payments as the layer-2 boom loses momentum
items.summary: The team behind Movement said it plans to leverage licensed payment partners alongside blockchain settlement rails to target the roughly $685 billion remittance market serving low and middle-income countries.
items.title_zh: 随着第二层繁荣失去动力，运动转向稳定币支付
items.summary_zh: Movement 背后的团队表示，计划利用获得许可的支付合作伙伴以及区块链结算轨道，瞄准服务于低收入和中等收入国家的约 6850 亿美元的汇款市场。

items.title: Stellar CEO says Clarity Act would help, but tokenization isn't dependent on it
items.summary: DTCC’s decision to connect its tokenized securities platform to Stellar marks a new phase of institutional adoption for public blockchains.
items.title_zh: Stellar首席执行官表示《清晰法案》会有所帮助，但代币化并不依赖于此
items.summary_zh: DTCC 决定将其代币化证券平台连接到 Stellar，标志着公共区块链的机构采用进入了新阶段。

items.title: Veda brings the vault stack behind Kraken DeFi Earn to Privy’s 2,000-plus developer teams
items.summary: The same vault stack powering Kraken DeFi Earn and EtherFi's Liquid will be available via a self-serve API for developers building on Privy.
items.title_zh: Veda 为 Privy 的 2,000 多名开发团队带来了 Kraken DeFi Earn 背后的金库堆栈
items.summary_zh: 为 Kraken DeFi Earn 和 EtherFi Liquid 提供支持的相同保险库堆栈将通过自助 API 供在 Privy 上构建的开发人员使用。

items.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
items.summary: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能政策和政治倡导的看法
items.summary_zh: 我们对人工智能政策和政治宣传的态度、透明度、对深思熟虑的监管和人工智能安全的支持，并且没有外部政治团体代表公司发言。

items.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
items.summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.
items.title_zh: 在密歇根州建设智能时代的基础设施
items.summary_zh: 作为 Stargate 的一部分，OpenAI 在密歇根州破土动工了一个 1GW 的数据中心项目，建设人工智能基础设施以扩大访问范围、创造就业机会并支持社区。

items.title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
items.summary: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
items.title_zh: 波士顿儿童医院使用人工智能解锁新诊断
items.summary_zh: 波士顿儿童医院使用 OpenAI 技术来改善患者护理、减轻运营负担并帮助诊断 40 多个罕见疾病病例。

items.title: How Braintrust turns customer requests into code with Codex
items.summary: How Braintrust engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to run experiments and code faster.

items.summary_zh: Braintrust 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 更快地运行实验和编码。

items.title: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework
items.summary: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.

items.summary_zh: 探索 OpenAI 的前沿治理框架，以及我们的 AI 安全、保障和风险实践如何与新兴的欧盟和加州法规保持一致。

items.title_zh: 超越法学硕士：为什么可扩展的企业人工智能采用取决于代理逻辑

items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 1 部分）：torch.profiler 初学者指南

items.title_zh: Reachy Mini 完全本地化

items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.summary: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.

items.summary_zh: 我们使用 Google AI Studio 编写了一个有关 I/O 2026 重要公告的测验。

items.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.

items.summary_zh: 观看 9 个视频，展示 Google I/O 2026 上宣布的 Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的功能。

items.summary: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.

items.summary_zh: 滑铁卢大学的学生开发了像手语导师这样的人工智能原型，以重塑教育和工作的未来。

items.title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
items.summary: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: Media Advisory: MIT to establish regional quantum hub
items.summary: With $25 million investment from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, MIT to build a new shared-use facility to serve as a statewide quantum toolbox.
items.title_zh: 媒体咨询：麻省理工学院将建立区域量子中心
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院获得马萨诸塞州联邦投资 2500 万美元，用于建造一个新的共享设施，作为全州范围内的量子工具箱。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育项目首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。
